comment: Factory defaults - every parameter is defined here. Override machine-specific values in local.json (see local.example.json for a template). local.json is not committed to source control.

connections.name: KoreData
connections.purpose: reference search and retrieval across feeds, encyclopedia, library, and internal documents

connections.name: KoreDocs
connections.purpose: document navigation, structured editing, and KoreFile authoring

connections.name: KoreGraph
connections.purpose: concept knowledge graph — search concepts by name, explore connections between concepts, and store new concept-relationship-concept triples extracted from text
